function.message: I could not complete the inbox request because one of the five referenced purchase-note paths does not exist in the workspace: `50_finance/purchases/_2026_01_03__eur_000032__bill__repair_ledger_faucet_parts.md`. I did not mutate any files.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree, AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system, read the inbox-processing workflow, and did not take partial action when a required referenced file was missing.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox note 00_inbox/724_next-task.md requests OCR for five specific files. Listing 50_finance/purchases showed only the four non-underscored files, and a targeted find for the fifth underscore-prefixed path returned no result. Under 99_system/workflows/process-next-inbox-item.md and 00_inbox/AGENTS.MD, if the request is blocked on missing canonical support, I must stop without mutating the workspace rather than silently process only part of the request.
